conflict: Ji-eun wants to confess publicly or disappear, while Ina cannot protect her without further illegality.
consequence: Ina promises to extract Ji-eun from her contract, binding herself to a new obligation she may fail to meet.
must_land_beats: Train journey includes genuine humor and non-strategic conversation.
Ji-eun describes life under trainee debt in concrete detail.
Ina refuses to sedate or silence her despite pressure texts.
A promise is made that will force future action.
objective: Hide Ji-eun in Busan and keep her psychologically intact.
